name: AgentShield Security Guard
description: Runtime security layer — inspects every tool call for intent consistency, trust violations, and injection attacks before execution.
author: AgentShield Contributors

coreUrl.description: URL of the AgentShield core engine

trustMapping.description: Map OpenClaw channel sources to AgentShield trust levels

blockMessage.default: This action was blocked by AgentShield security policy.
blockMessage.description: Message shown to the user when a tool call is blocked

confirmTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for REQUIRE_CONFIRMATION decisions
